# SEQUIconsulting
> Beyond borders. Inside processes. International trade, cross-border regulatory compliance, software development, and AI assistance consulting since 1996.

## Core pages
- [English site](https://www.sequiconsulting.com/en.html) — Full English version
- [Sito italiano](https://www.sequiconsulting.com/) — Versione italiana completa
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.sequiconsulting.com/privacy.html)
- [Informativa Privacy](https://www.sequiconsulting.com/privacy-it.html)
- [Full LLMs content](https://www.sequiconsulting.com/llms-full.txt) — Complete bilingual markdown

## About
SEQUIconsulting is a consulting firm founded in 1996 by Samuele "Sam" Sequi, a certified professional under Italian Law 4/2013 and member of [UniExportManager](https://www.uniexportmanager.it/). Based in Ancona, Italy, the firm serves clients across Italy, the UK, and Europe. Core practice: international trade, cross-border regulatory compliance, custom software development, and AI-assisted business process automation.

## Services
- Internationalisation Strategy: import/export, foreign-to-foreign operations, branch and subsidiary setup, market analysis
- Cross-Border Regulatory Compliance: CE marking, dual-use regulations, import/export licensing, product compliance
- Customs and Classification: HS codes, preferential and non-preferential origin, AEO authorisations, customs documentation
- Software Development: custom business applications, workflow automation, legacy modernisation, web platforms
- AI Assistance for Business: AI readiness assessment, LLM-powered automation, document intelligence, chatbot deployment
- Environmental Compliance & Certifications: REACH, RoHS, WEEE, EPR, PFAS, carbon footprint; voluntary certifications (ISO) as a complementary service

## Credentials
- Professional framework under Italian Law 4/2013
- Active member of UniExportManager (recognised by Italian Ministry of Economic Development)
- 30+ years of field experience (since 1996)
